links.source_location: both follow the 'atomically replace rows for file_id from parsed markdown' scanner-slow-path pattern
Block variant resolves via ^block-id anchors from blocks.rs
audit #269 caught the cross-thread propagation bug
validates extract -> render -> cache -> prefs round-trip
uses MathBlock/MathDisplayStyle types from Rust core
single fixture vault + single method + inline assertions Milestone shape
Both test helper-computed primaryAccessibilityLabel; same AT-via-computed trade-off documented
both are pure-logic unit tests for embed-byte-range manipulation
